title: Counterweight Action
prompt:
Create a production-ready Counterweight Action using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. It is a deliberate primary action for a compact Bento card: a crisp black label sits beside a mint circular counterweight that slides from the far edge to the center only after activation. Use a white or #F4F5F6 page field, a white control surface, #111111 text, #4A4A4F supporting text, a 22px radius, one-pixel #ECECEE borders, and a very soft shadow. Do not put a gradient on the card; mint is the only bright accent. The resting label reads “Review changes”; after activation it reads “Ready to publish” and exposes a short status line.

Use local state and a semantic button. On pointer hover, raise the control 2px over 180ms; on press, compress it 1px for 90ms. On click, move the counterweight with a spring of stiffness 360 and damping 27, crossfade the two labels for 160ms, and announce the changed state with a polite live region. Pressing Enter or Space must trigger exactly the same behavior. Keep a visible 3px dark focus ring, a 44px minimum target, and no icon-only ambiguity.

The component must shrink cleanly at 320px and may grow naturally in a detail preview without fixed positioning. Prefer transform and opacity animations; avoid remote assets, timers, storage, random values, and network calls. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by changing the content instantly or with a 120ms opacity fade. Include clear ARIA labels, strong contrast, and a CSS-only equivalent with suggested HTML.

code.css: /* Suggested HTML: */ .uiwiki-counterweight-action{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;min-height:48px;padding:0 16px;overflow:hidden;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:#111;color:#fff;font:800 14px/1 Inter,system-ui;box-shadow:0 8px 20px #1112;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-counterweight-action i{position:absolute;right:12px;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#53e8d4;transition:transform 260ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.uiwiki-counterweight-action:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-counterweight-action:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-counterweight-action,.uiwiki-counterweight-action i{transition:none}}
